top_signals.title: ECB Set to Raise Rates for First Time Since 2023
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank is set to raise interest rates for the first time since 2023, judging it can no longer ignore the upswing in inflation caused by the Iran war. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook is in Frankfurt with a preview of today's decision. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog
top_signals.summary:
CISA has added one new vulnerability to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog, based on evidence of active exploitation.

  • CVE-2026-45247 Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability

This type of vulnerability is a frequent attack vector for malicious cyber actors and poses significant risks to the federal enterprise.

Binding Operational Directive (BOD) 22-01: Reducing the Significant Risk of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities established the KEV Catalog as a living list of known Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) that carry significant risk to the federal enterprise. BOD 22-01 requires Federal Civilian Executive Branch (FCEB) agencies to remediate identified vulnerabilities by the due date to protect FCEB networks against active threats. See the BOD 22-01 Fact Sheet for more information.

Although BOD 22-01 only applies to FCEB agencies, CISA strongly urges all organizations to reduce their exposure to cyberattacks by prioritizing timely remediation of KEV Catalog vulnerabilities as part of their vulnerability management practice. CISA will continue to add vulnerabilities to the catalog that meet the specified criteria.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: TradFi advisors want stablecoins, tokenization over Bitcoin: Bitwise
top_signals.summary: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan says it was “pretty hard to engage with advisors on Bitcoin” during recent discussions, who are more interested in stablecoins and tokenization.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
top_signals.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting account passwords.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Army astronaut tapped for NASA’s Artemis III mission
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Army is launching into space again by way of Col. Frank Rubio, who will be part of the 2027 Artemis III mission, NASA announced Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Solana infrastructure firm Helius acquires Light Protocol to expand onchain privacy
top_signals.summary: The acquisition comes amid a moment of consolidation in the crypto industry and during a resurgent interest in onchain privacy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: US Inflation Accelerates, Though Core Gauge Comes in Softer - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: US Inflation Accelerates, Though Core Gauge Comes in Softer  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: College sticker prices top $100,000 at 16 schools — but many students pay significantly less
top_signals.summary: The cost of attendance at a growing number of colleges is now more than six figures a year, according to data from The Princeton Review.

top_signals.title: Company moves from Singapore to cheaper, more spacious Malaysia show rising global mobility trend
top_signals.summary: Lower costs, tax incentives and access to a larger market have seen a raft of companies shift operations to Malaysia from Singapore.

top_signals.title: AI researcher claims he's already bypassed Anthropic's Fable 5 guardrails
top_signals.summary: “Pliny the Liberator,” says he has been “cleverly finding the holes in the fence that the thought police missed,” in the newly launched Fable 5.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: Alleged Kimwolf Botmaster ‘Dort’ Arrested, Charged in U.S. and Canada
alerts.summary: Canadian authorities on Wednesday arrested a 23-year-old Ottawa man on suspicion of building and operating Kimwolf, a fast spreading Internet-of-Things botnet that enslaved millions of devices for use in a series of massive distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attacks over the past six months. KrebsOnSecurity publicly named the suspect in February 2026 after the accused launched a volley of DDoS, doxing and swatting campaigns against this author and a security researcher. He now faces criminal hacking charges in both Canada and the United States.
alerts.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: UK weakens proposed telecoms defenses against Chinese hackers after industry pushback
alerts.summary: Britain has weakened proposed cybersecurity protections for its telecoms networks that were developed in response to the Salt Typhoon espionage campaign, after the companies responsible for implementing the measures lobbied against them.
alerts.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
